description_long: This is a modern, low-profile entertainment cabinet featuring a long, rectangular structure with a dark wood top and white lower panels. The cabinet supports a large flat-screen television at its center, with decorative items such as vases with flowers, books, and small sculptures arranged on either side. The surface is smooth and sleek, with a clear distinction between the wooden top and the lighter-colored base. The cabinet appears to have multiple compartments or drawers, likely for storage, though no handles are visible. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban living rooms or lounges. The object is wall-mounted, giving it a floating appearance and maximizing floor space.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted entertainment cabinet with a dark wood top, white base, and decorative items flanking a large flat-screen TV. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and integrated storage compartments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the TV, decorative items, and the full length of the cabinet's wooden top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cabinet's slim profile and the arrangement of items along its depth.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the TV screen, decorative objects, and the clean, handle-less white base panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and placement of vases and books on the cabinet.
